required_preferences.fact: No longer uses campus library study spaces for MBA coursework — MBA studies are suspended during Switzerland fellowship, and there are no regular academic work sessions

supersedes.fact: Uses campus library study spaces for MBA coursework immediately following evening classes, instead of working at home

required_preferences.fact: Schedules early-morning video calls with European and Asian teams several times per week — no longer protects all mornings for solo campaign planning

supersedes.fact: Blocks early mornings for uninterrupted campaign planning — never schedules meetings before 10am

required_preferences.fact: Prepares a rotating set of quick breakfast options for early video call days — prioritizes protein smoothies and overnight oats over hot meals
Prefers hosting or attending family dinners on weeknights, prioritizing home-cooked meals and group outings over solo evenings, while his parents are in Chicago for summer
Starts each weekday with a brisk walk along Lake Geneva instead of Chicago's downtown loop, enjoying scenic mornings before work
Schedules one-on-one video check-ins with direct reports in Asia and Europe every month, instead of informal drop-bys

persona: A 28-year-old marketing manager at a multinational corporation
